title: DiscordCommand
description: This plugin adds a /discord command that sends players a styled chat message with a hover tooltip and a clickable link to your Discord server. When hovered, it shows additional text, and when clicked, it opens the Discord invite URL.
body:
## DiscordCommand

This plugin adds a simple `/discord` command that sends players a clean, customizable Discord message in chat. The message supports **hover text** (tooltip) and an optional **clickable link** that opens your Discord invite URL.

All texts and the invite link can be configured via the config file, so you can easily match your server’s style without editing the code. Perfect for quickly sharing your Discord with players in-game.
